testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Concentration Limits
testcase.name: handles new positions correctly

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Sector Limits
testcase.name: applies sector concentration limits

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Sector Limits
testcase.name: allows position in underweight sectors

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Risk Recommendation Generation
testcase.name: generates conservative recommendation for high risk

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Risk Recommendation Generation
testcase.name: generates positive recommendation for low risk

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Risk Recommendation Generation
testcase.name: provides actionable recommendations

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Error Handling
testcase.name: handles database errors gracefully

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Error Handling
testcase.name: handles invalid volatility data

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Error Handling
testcase.name: handles empty portfolio composition

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Performance and Edge Cases
testcase.name: completes position sizing calculation within reasonable time

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Performance and Edge Cases
testcase.name: handles very small portfolio values

testcase.classname: Risk Manager Unit Tests › Performance and Edge Cases
testcase.name: handles very large portfolio values

testcase.classname: Settings API Keys Route › GET /api/settings/api-keys
testcase.name: should return data in correct format expected by frontend

testcase.classname: Settings API Keys Route › GET /api/settings/api-keys
testcase.name: should handle API key service disabled gracefully

testcase.classname: Settings API Keys Route › GET /api/settings/api-keys
testcase.name: should handle API key service errors gracefully

testcase.classname: Settings API Keys Route › GET /api/settings/api-keys
testcase.name: should require authentication

testcase.classname: Settings API Keys Route › GET /api/settings/api-keys
testcase.name: should validate user ID from token

testcase.classname: Settings API Keys Route › GET /api/settings/api-keys
testcase.name: should call API key service with correct user ID
